entry.title: No price could be determined for subcontracting
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I understand same issue were reported in past and there are multiple blogs are available. 

However, none of the blogs are helping to fix my issue.

I am doing CK11N for Subcontracting material and getting error message of 'CK 468 No price could be determined for subcontracting'.

I have checked below list of activities:

- Price strategy under Subcontracting tab of valuation variant is 4 (Gross Quotation Price), 7 (Net Purchase Order Price) and 5 (Effective Price from Quotation)

- Material master is maintained with procurement type 'X' and Special Procurement as '30'

- Purchasing Info record is maintained with valid vendor and validity period and no deletion flag is set

- Purchase order also exist for same material and vendor against PIR

- Material master is also checked in MRP, Purchasing, Accounting and Costing view. Field for 'Do Not Cost' is unticked

Despite of all above mentioned activities, I am getting subject mentioned issue. Also, there are more than 20 subcontracting material but only material is working correctly while rest materials are giving error.

Only difference I noticed between failed vs correct data is value in 'Price Strategy' column in CK11N itemization is blank for failed data while it is appearing as '7' for correct data.  However, I am unable to figure out why price strategy is blank. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  FIN Controlling

entry.title: Re: WalkMe Now Available in SAP SuccessFactors : A New Era of Digital Adoption
entry.content:
Good morning. Does it require any specific license? Is it available for all implemented modules? Is it available in the various configured languages?
Thanks

entry.title: Re: Can I deliver a custom theme to all subscribers of my...
entry.content:
This just came in this week: Creating Local-Entry-Point Business Solutions | SAP Help Portal

There is a new plan called local-entry-point for the where you provide SaaS application on your own approuter. 

You can list your custom theme in the cdm as mentioned here: Configuring the Launchpad to Use the Custom Theme | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Replication Flows
entry.content: the CDS view changed. Create new replication flow with new target table and then compare the data field. Then stop the replication flow and adjust the target table field.

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate in under 9 minutes
entry.content: very insightful .Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Functionality for EDI Processing: Setup and Testing of API for Inbound Order Creatio
entry.content:
Hi Eurico,

Thank you for your comment and for sharing your experience — it's encouraging to hear others are on the same path.

To answer your question: no, I haven’t made any modifications. I simply reproduced basic examples using the API that I had previously implemented with IDOCs, all on a completely standard system.

entry.title: Re: Need Help with Column-Level Data Access Control in SA...
entry.content:
Object nor Column authorizations are not avl in DSP as of now. 

You can leverage SAC Teams and in the Story via script check the SAC Teams and based on that show/hide measures

In DSP I can imagine (I never needed this as I can use the SAC Teams approach) that you can miss-use the DACs by creating a dummy dimension (populate these in the model-view) for each group of measures (Sales/Inventory/Finance).

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: Analytic Model - Variable - Option "D...
entry.content: Hi, have you checked the view you fetch the default value from? If that works? For me the dynamic default works as well. No issue. Cheers, Martin

entry.title: How to trigger an abap breakpoint from Fiori preview?
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm following the RAP-Tutorial from the OpenSap course ( https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/btp-abap-environment/rap-opensap).

To play around a little I want to execute the fiori preview, play around a little bit and trigger breakpoints in my abap code.

As I understand, breakpoints in adt are external so this should worrk. However, my breakpoints don't get triggered.

 

Example:

I have this action defined

with the corresponding abap code

What could be the probleme? User Issues?

I'm on btp trial with my personald p-user

entry.title: Re: Performance comparison: FILTER vs LOOP vs FOR
entry.content:
Quite impressive. I prefer to do my own test below, with data independent from database to be reproducible by anybody, but get the same result:

FILTER, I understand that it's faster probably due to an implementation in the kernel (but still impressed by the big difference with others).

I don't understand why FOR is so much slower than LOOP AT.

Test done with ABAP 7.58, kernel 793 SP 51 (on premises).

Code (run the test as ABAP Unit):

CLASS main DEFINITION FOR TESTING RISK LEVEL HARMLESS DURATION SHORT.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    CONSTANTS runs TYPE i VALUE 500000.

    CLASS-METHODS class_setup.

    METHODS run_for         FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.
    METHODS run_loop_append FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.
    METHODS run_loop_insert FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.
    METHODS run_filter      FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.

    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF ts_perf_test,
        vbeln TYPE vbrp-vbeln,
        posnr TYPE vbrp-posnr,
      END OF ts_perf_test.
    TYPES tt_perf_test TYPE SORTED TABLE OF ts_perf_test WITH UNIQUE KEY vbeln posnr.

    CLASS-DATA table_perf_test TYPE tt_perf_test.
    CLASS-DATA vbeln_anywhere  TYPE vbrp-vbeln.

ENDCLASS.


CLASS main IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD class_setup.
    DATA(table_perf_test) = VALUE tt_perf_test( FOR vbeln = 1 WHILE vbeln <= 5000
                                                FOR posnr = 1 WHILE posnr <= 4
                                                ( vbeln = vbeln
                                                  posnr = posnr ) ) ##NEEDED.
    vbeln_anywhere = 333.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD run_for.
    DO runs TIMES.
      DATA(selected_items) = VALUE tt_perf_test( FOR <item> IN table_perf_test
                                                 WHERE ( vbeln = vbeln_anywhere )
                                                 ( <item> ) ) ##NEEDED.
    ENDDO.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD run_loop_append.
    DO runs TIMES.
      DATA(selected_items) = VALUE tt_perf_test( ) ##NEEDED.
      LOOP AT table_perf_test ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<item>) WHERE vbeln = vbeln_anywhere.
        APPEND <item> TO selected_items.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDDO.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD run_loop_insert.
    DO runs TIMES.
      DATA(selected_items) = VALUE tt_perf_test( ) ##NEEDED.
      LOOP AT table_perf_test ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<item>) WHERE vbeln = vbeln_anywhere.
        INSERT <item> INTO TABLE selected_items.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDDO.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD run_filter.
    DO runs TIMES.
      DATA(selected_items) = FILTER tt_perf_test( table_perf_test WHERE vbeln = vbeln_anywhere ) ##NEEDED.
    ENDDO.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Problems with Ariba SES digits
entry.content:
Posting on behalf of @jsainzh as it has been asked via private message

Hello Vijayendra,

Could you help me on the following:

I´m a end user for Procurement; we´re facing problems when a Supplier creates a SES in Ariba and it is sent to S4 for internal approval. This is because in Ariba supplier can capture 4 digits after decimal point and in S4 we have just three digits after decimal point. Obviously quantity will differ in each system and Accounting rejects the SES receipt because is not accurate.

entry.title: Re: Problems with Ariba SES digits
entry.content:
Hello @jsainzh 

For amount and quantity it is different configuration and restriction.

- Amount then currency decimal places in OY04. However for amount dynamic handling of Decimal Places approach can be used.
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/dynamic-handling-of-decimal-p... 

- Quantity then UOM decimal places in CUNI. However even if this is done it will not impacts purchasing document. Refer below note.
https://me.sap.com/notes/0002437878

Now your is more with respect to quantity where change is not allowed not at configuration level but at document level. As the domain for the quantity field allows only 3 decimal. I will suggest see if rounding can be done at ARIBA before sending. 

Also check how UOMs are mapped as per below.

https://help.sap.com/docs/buying-invoicing/common-data-import-and-administration-for-sap-ariba-procu... 

I would request you to post this as query in community with proper tag for others as well and for which solution it is for SAP public or private cloud.

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: How to attach file to Q&A and Blog Posts in Community...
entry.content: Stupid me. It's not in the top toolbar with buttons "Insert Photos" and "Insert video", it's below the text area, right above the buttons "Cancel" and "Post":

entry.title: Re: Error when performing write operations to Create , de...
entry.content:
You have defined a date column in the table, but you indicated a datetime annotation in the CDS view entity.

NB: 1) Thanks for attaching the short dump. 2) For making your question findable, you should type the exception class is CX_CSP_ACT_REQUEST as text instead of image.

Reference code in the short dump you have attached (method ADD_MAPPING_FOR_TIMESTAMP of local class LCLA_ADMIN_DATA_STRATEGY in CL_CSP_ACT_SET_ADMIN_DATA):

      " We expect that the time stamp element is either typed as UTCLONG or TIMESTAMP(L)
      DATA(lo_timestamp_elem_descr) = CAST cl_abap_elemdescr( cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_data( <lv_timestamp_value> ) ).
      IF lo_timestamp_elem_descr->type_kind = cl_abap_typedescr=>typekind_utclong.
        " is UTCLONG
        <lv_timestamp_value> = mv_change_timestamp_as_utclong.
      ELSE.
        " expect TIMESTAMP(L)
        TRY.

            cl_abap_tstmp=>move( EXPORTING tstmp_src=mv_change_timestampl
                                 IMPORTING tstmp_tgt = <lv_timestamp_value> ).
          CATCH cx_sy_dyn_call_illegal_type INTO DATA(lx_invalid_type_for_admin_data).
            RAISE SHORTDUMP NEW cx_csp_act_request( textid       = cx_csp_act_request=>incomp_type_for_timestamp
                                                    entity_name  = iv_entity_name
                                                    element_name = <lv_timestamp_elem_name> )->enrich( ).
        ENDTRY.
      ENDIF.

entry.title: How should suppliers contact you then?
entry.content:
In SAP Business ByDesign (SAP ByD), when a Purchase Order (PO) is sent to a supplier via email, the system typically uses a default sender email like donotreply@..., which is an outbound-only system address. This can cause confusion if suppliers try to reply directly to that email.

What is the process to receive supplier concern regarding the sent in SAPByd ?

entry.title: Re: Consume REST API in SAP CAP using BTP
entry.content:
I followed and getting the below error.

Could not find service binding of type 'destination'. This might cause errors in other parts of the application.
ErrorWithCause: Failed to load destination.

 

Can you please help?

entry.title: SAP Business one
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,

We have identified a reporting limitation in SAP Business One related to Business Partner (BP) location-based outstanding data.

In documents like Incoming Payments, Outgoing Payments, BP Opening Balances, and Journal Vouchers, there is no option to select the Business Partner location. However, in marketing documents such as AP Invoices, AR Invoices, Deliveries, GRPOs, Debit Notes, and Credit Notes, the BP location field is available.

Many of our clients require reports like General Ledger, Aging Reports, and Outstanding Reports to be filtered or segmented by BP location. Due to the absence of BP location tagging in financial transactions, we are currently unable to generate such reports accurately from the system.

We would like to know:

  1. Is there any standard functionality or recommended workaround to fulfill this requirement?

  2. Can this feature be considered for future enhancement in SAP Business One?

Your guidance or suggestions on how to address this reporting gap would be highly appreciated.

Hi,

Thanks

Ramesh

entry.title: Re: How to trigger an abap breakpoint from Fiori preview?
entry.content:
Hello Martin,

Regarding your images, I think you need to select one line and then click the 'Accept' button. This will trigger the event, and finally, it will stop at your breakpoint.

entry.title: Re: How to trigger an abap breakpoint from Fiori preview?
entry.content: No, it doesn't. That's exactly why i ask this question. thi

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting - Consolidation Frequency Yearly
entry.content: cons. frequency assignment to consolidation group (in t-code CX1Q) does NOT impact task "executability" in cons. monitor at all. So, you rely on the period category (when assigning task group to dimension) to control task "executability" in cons. monitor.

entry.title: Wrong Currency Exchange Rate fetching while post Export Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi Expert

Can anyone help us to fetch foreign currency exchange rate on billing from sales order, because in our case we had create another exchange rate type "B" for Curr. Exch.Rate for Export instead of standard type "M". Now system consider the same rates on sales order based on ex.rate type "B" but not on billing document (VF01) and on billing date system calling exch.rate from "M". Kindly help to resolve this issue on Public Edition.

 

Thanks 

Vinay

entry.title: While executing CIF IM 'ATP-PPM' then getting error message 'Message No. MM108' (No alternative unit
entry.content:

An error is encountered, while executing CIF integration model PPM integration model. The error appears as 'No alternative unit of measure specified', Message No. MM108. At that time no error queues appeared neither inbound / outbound in APO nor in S4H. Thanks !

entry.title: CIF errror message 'Message No. MM108' (No alternative unit of measure specified)
entry.content: While doing CIF for the PPM integration model. The error appears as 'No alternative unit of measure specified', Message No. MM108. At that time no error queues appeared neither inbound / outbound in APO nor in S4H. Please suggest, in case any possible solution is there.... thanks!

entry.title: Re: Building Intelligent Data Applications with SAP HANA Cloud Knowledge Graph Engine
entry.content: Hi @Saurabh, Thanks for your feedback. As mentioned in the blog, here is the link to the mission. Start the mission, and you will get access to the Project Board with implementation steps. For the system with KGE enabled, you will require an SAP HANA Cloud CPEA/Pay-as-you-go subscription.

entry.title: Groovy Script : Generate Dynamic Filename
entry.content:
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message

import java.text.SimpleDateFormat

 

def Message processData(Message message) {

    def date = new Date()

    def sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss")

    def timestamp = sdf.format(date)

    def fileName = "Invoice_" + timestamp + ".pdf"

 

    message.setProperty("dynamicFilename", fileName)

    return message

}

entry.title: Re: How to trigger an abap breakpoint from Fiori preview?
entry.content: Okay, I solved it by myself. I logged out in my browser, I closed eclipse, reopened it again and logged in into the orject, logged in in the firori preview my browser and it worked.

entry.title: Re: Are BTP Solution Diagram Guidelines available?
entry.content: I tried downloading the latest draw.io and i could see SAP as library now as default with various icons, flows, architecture of only BTP related but there are tons of other SAP Products which doesn't have icons, logos, architecture flow to include.. such as SAP Sales Cloud V2, SAP Commerce Cloud, SAP CPQ, SAP Incentive Management, SAP Leanix, Signavio, SAP Customer Data Cloud, Emersys... many such.. i would be nice to have all SAP products in one l.ibrary.

entry.title: Paraguay presente en SAP Inside Track Campinas 2025
entry.content:
¡Qué experiencia increíble vivimos este 5 de abril en el SAP Inside Track Campinas 2025!
Como parte de la comunidad SAP Paraguay, fue un privilegio estar presente en FACAMP y sentir esa energía única que solo los eventos SIT logran crear. Nuestra delegación, aunque pequeña, fue recibida con los brazos abiertos por nuestros colegas brasileños, demostrando que el espíritu de la comunidad SAP trasciende fronteras.

Una agenda que superó expectativas
Lo más destacado del SITCPS fue sin duda su potente agenda

  • Inteligencia Artificial para Consultores Funcionales
  • Simplificación de conectividad bancaria con soluciones SAP y APIs
  • Metodología RISE with SAP
  • Joule: La nueva asistente de inteligencia artificial de SAP
  • Signavio y Lean IX (Transformación de Negocios)
  • Optimización con SAP Fiori y personalizaciones Clean Core
  • Casos prácticos de SAP Business AI

Hands-on: Aprender haciendo
Sin olvidar los increíbles talleres prácticos:

  • Workflow en SAP BTP
  • Desarrollo de aplicaciones FIORI en BTP sin código
  • SAP BTP Build

El valor real: Conexiones humanas
Además de las charlas técnicas, lo que más valoro son las conversaciones informales durante los coffee breaks - ¡ahí es donde nacen las mejores ideas!

Diferencias y aprendizajes
Me sorprendió ver lo madura que está la comunidad brasileña, con eventos SIT que atraen a cientos de participantes y patrocinadores importantes. En Paraguay, estamos dando nuestros primeros pasos, pero con gran entusiasmo. La clave parece estar en la consistencia y en crear espacios donde el conocimiento fluya libremente.

Próximos pasos para nuestra comunidad
Inspirados por esta experiencia, ya estamos planificando nuestro primer SIT Paraguay para noviembre 2025. Queremos replicar lo mejor del modelo brasileño, adaptándolo a nuestra realidad.

Gracias a Roberta Fernandes y Manuel Robalinho y todo el equipo organizador por hacer posible este encuentro. Espero que pronto podamos recibirlos en Paraguay para fortalecer aún más los lazos entre nuestras comunidades SAP.


Si eres un profesional SAP en Paraguay y aún no te has unido a nuestra comunidad, ¡este es el momento! Síguenos en LinkedIn y únete a nuestro grupo de WhatsApp para estar al tanto de nuestros próximos encuentros.

¡Nos vemos en el próximo SIT, sea en Brasil o en Paraguay!
Zami

entry.title: Re: Introducing the New Project Creation Wizard within SAP Build Lobby
entry.content: @schatwe get often confused when UI/UX is changing recently (last 6months,3 times new look in SAP Build Lobby) and we don't get notifications on the improvement coming to get adopted. Moreover its not so user friendly to navigate to each other screens with new look.  Try to minimize the clicks to go the right application we need to go.. today we need to click 4 times to go SAP Build Apps , SAP Build Code.

entry.title: SAC Story Planning Version unable to display empty Column
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

Created  sac story on Responsive 

Using Version Management created blank public Version  T2 and published without data 

in Story created Input control  can see T2 but iam  unable to select  this need to be seen story as Blank so that user can come and edit values  PFA Image. Can some one help on possible ways

entry.title: Re: Performance comparison: FILTER vs LOOP vs FOR
entry.content:
I looked at the byte codes generated for each method:

Comparison between "VALUE #( FOR" and "LOOP AT": the difference is a memory allocation which is done only by "VALUE #( FOR" (STCK S 05), and also a little difference in TUTL which is accompanied by PAR1.

VALUE #( FOR:

  • iclr 04
  • STCK 05
  • iclr 00
  • STCK 04
  • ...
  • TUTL 1A
  • PAR1 10 

LOOP AT:

  • STCK 04
  • ...
  • TUTL 1A

I confirm that FILTER is fully implemented by kernel (only one instruction TOPS 10 with PAR1/PAR2), the loop is done by kernel, not by the byte code, it's why it's fast.

PS: for information, the byte code can be seen mainly via LOAD REPORT 'program name' PART 'CONT', but it's very difficult to decode it, and other "parts" are also needed to differentiate which code belongs to which method and so on.

entry.title: Retrieve FIORI Adaptation project from SAP ABAP system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In my organization, a developer created a adaptation project and deployed in ABAP system, and its working fine. Now this project is not pushed on GIT.

I got a requirement to do some changes like adding some additional fields in same adaptation project. 

So I wanted to know how to retrieve the adaptation project from SAP Abap system to BAS to make changes. Could you please help me with steps. Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Dhiraj

entry.title: Re: Webhooks in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
@rocsharma 

Its better you can modify slightly in your code to use SAP Destination Services which you can store your SSC URL,  username , password and use the Destination Name in ´the manifest.yml .. We did the same in our project.

Thanks to @JoEng for providing the git repo template to get understand and we as implementation consultant have to think better to adjust according to our need as security concern.

entry.title: Re: Partner TDD Onboarding for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition – Guide for Common Issues
entry.content: Great Job for S/4HANA CLOUD PC

entry.title: Re: Performance comparison: FILTER vs LOOP vs FOR
entry.content: My conclusion concerning the performance between "VALUE #( FOR" and "LOOP AT": there's a constant overhead of 4 microseconds for "VALUE #( FOR" on my system (whatever the number of lines in the internal table). It's the same kind of meaningless difference as between LOOP AT ... ASSIGNING and LOOP AT ... REFERENCE INTO (styleguides/clean-abap/CleanABAP.md at main · SAP/styleguides · GitHub: "Additionally, data access via field symbols is slightly faster than data access via references. This is only noticable when loops make up a significant part of the runtime of the program and is often not relevant...")

entry.title: Re: Integration of Lottie with SAP Build Apps

@EsmeeA @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: Re: Quick tip: How to check if the changes from the adaptation project are active?
entry.content:
Hi @GregMalewski ,

Thanks for your suggestion. 

I have a doubt and need your help.

Requirement:- My team member created a adaptation project and deployed on ABAP repository system. Now this adaptation project not pushed on GIT. 

Now I got some requirement to add additional field to same adaptation project. So wanted to check with you, can I retrieve the existing adaption project in BAS from ABAP system to modify the changes?

if yes, then could you please share the step.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Dhiraj

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Planning Version unable to display empty Co...
entry.content:
Hi @yoursraghu986,

In input control version there is no data this is the reason you can't select this.

You need to "Unbooked on" in version management from right side builder panel.

Or you can put 0 for each measure so user will input it. 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: 1902-Enable Self-Service Features in SuccessFactors Reporting
entry.content: What to do if you don't have the Online Report Designer in the Upgrade Center?

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Planning Version unable to display empty Co...
entry.content: Thanks for update, yes we tried with option ‘Unbooked’ but problems is it doesn’t have data it’s not showing in report

entry.title: Re: Runtime Error LOAD_PROGRAM_CLASS_MISMATCH
entry.content: If you get the dump, go to ST22, select the dump and click on SAP Recommandation button. It will fix the short dump.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi community! I am so happy to join this group. It is great to have a place to discuss events, publish content, and connect with community members!

entry.title: Print Queue S/4 output management is not working for zpl printers
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am SAP form service by adobe to render PDF and using Print queue to transmit spool on to the system.

The spool generates without errors for PDF and XML device types and when it is ZPL the spool is generated with errors.

Process on how i am generating this spool.
-> In Maintain print queue Firor app we are maintain print queue name, format, printer destination, etc.
-> I am calling ADS REST API to render PDF 
-> Once the PDF is rendered, I am using class cl_print_queue_util which is storing the data at this app and transmits spool on to the system.

But spool only generates without error for PDF and XML devices type and for ZPL spool generated with errors

can anyone help here?

Note: XDC was also assigned for that ZPL device type.

Regards,
Bharath

entry.title: How to impact new batch number creation ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to implement custom logic, base on which system will:

create new batch number for received material

or will use the last batch number for that specific material

which exit shoud I use?

entry.title: Re: how to set Granted user's company as a target population
entry.content: If the permissions are same then, create 1 group as granted for each administrator. Create 1 group as target for each administrator. So 10 granted and 10 target groups and  assign these groups to the role.

entry.title: Re: Change Record
entry.content: Hi Sir, I want to implement a requirement from the user: whenever the BOM (Bill of Materials) is changed, it should go for approval. I tried to handle it using Change Record (Engineering Change Management), but I was not successful. If you know how to do this, please create a scenario with screenshots and explain it step-by-step.

entry.title: reference a custom field in business rule
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to create a business rule that filters the accessibility through the use of one of the custom fields. But it is hard to find this field under the "Context" tree. I have set the custom field "custom01" using the "Manage Business Configuration" and then under "Employee Profile" I chose "standard" to reach for the custom field configuration. Any clue on how/where to find that custom field?

entry.title: Re: How to update Section Code for Posted Document: SAP P...
entry.content:
​Hello,

Please note: In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the Journal Entry Post API does not directly support including the Section Code field during posting. However, two primary approaches address this limitation.

First Option: Set a Default Section Code for Supplier Transactions
By customising the vendor master data, you can configure a default Section Code (e.g., "1000") for all supplier transactions. This involves setting the Section Code in the vendor's master record, which the system will then default to related transactions.​

Steps:

  • Navigate to the vendor master data maintenance.
  • Enter the desired Section Code ("1000") in the appropriate field.
  • Save the changes.​

This approach ensures that all transactions involving this vendor automatically inherit the specified Section Code.

Second option: Utilise Custom Fields via In-App Extensibility
If setting a default in the vendor master data is not feasible, you can create a custom field to capture the Section Code during the journal entry posting process. This method leverages SAP's in-app extensibility features.​

Steps:

  • Access the "Custom Fields and Logic" app in the SAP Fiori launchpad.
  • Create a new custom field with the appropriate data type and label (e.g., "Section Code").
  • Enable the field for the relevant business context, such as "Accounting: Journal Entry Item."
  • Enabling the field under the "SOAP APIs" tab will ensure it is available in the Journal Entry Post API.
  • Implement any necessary logic to default the value to "1000" if required.​

This approach allows for greater flexibility and ensures that the Section Code is captured during posting.​

Post-Posting Updates
If none of the above approaches is suitable, and you need to update the Section Code after posting, you can consider the following below,

  • Use the "Manage Journal Entries" app to update the Section Code in posted documents manually.
  • Develop a custom report or use mass maintenance tools to update the Section Code in bulk.​

Note that post-posting updates may impact reporting and compliance, so it's essential to ensure that such changes are audited and documented appropriately.​

Hope it helps!

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Logs to check who deployed/undeployed the iFlow
entry.content: I believe it's only who deployed it but not who undeployed it. Right?

entry.title: Stock-Single Material Fiori app
entry.content:
The key features of the 'Stock - Single Material' Fiori application are

  • The user can enter the product ID, and the screen automatically displays all the stock information. The beauty of the Fiori design user interface is that you do not have to click anywhere; just enter the product ID, and the desired stock information is right in front of you.
  • The stock information is bifurcated into various types, such as unrestricted, valuation blocked stock, quality inspection, returns, transfer stock, GR blocked stock, reserved, etc. Although this feature was available in the MMBE tcode in SAP ECC also, here the user interface is better. Please refer to the screenshot below.

 

  • The reporting date in this application represents the date on which the stock situation is represented.
  • There is a button on the right-hand side top that can help to represent the stock situation in graphical form. This point is important because handling graphical data is a key capability of the HANA database.

 

  • Users can enlarge the stock information with the help of the enlarge button on the top right-hand side.

 

  • There is a bar code feature with this application. When this app is used to scan a bar code then 
  • From a basic information point of view, this Fiori app has few similarities with MMBE tcode in GUI but from user interface and new features point of view, it is far ahead of MMBE.
  • Next important feature is stock history in graphical format. Graphical format gives a clear view of the stock level on a timeline of the last 12 months and also shows the comparison with minimum safety stock. You can zoom in on the particular part of the graph and see the details of the stock level. You can also drill down to daily history.

 

 

  • When you drill down stock at a certain data point, then it can show you the date on which goods movement (GR/GI) was done and the material document number as well.

So above are the important features of the Single Stock Material Fiori app. Not all these features were not available in SAP ECC.

You may also check this link: https://help.sap.com/docs/service-asset-manager/sap-service-and-asset-manager-configuration-guide/mobile-transaction-history-e40221db7f614d719f6fd7184609b2e4

Sahil Dudeja

entry.title: Find source code of fiori applications in Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am sorry to ask this stupid question, but I did not find the answer by myself.

I am working on a SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud 2502 system, and I know that some custom fiori applications were developed in this system, some of which are based on the fiori elements model.

I am able to find the RAP cloud ABAP code written for the fiori elements applications in Eclipse ADT, OK. But How to see the "application code" generated in Business Application Studio BAS?

How in BTP, Business Application Studio, can I find the source code of the fiori elements applications, as well as the non fiori applications? I tried looking everywhere, but I do not see them when I connect to my own dev space, in BAS, from BTP tool.

Thank you for your help

entry.title: SAP as a career
entry.content: I recently started learning SAP (MM), and even though I come from an IT background, I’ve developed a strong interest in this module. Are there career opportunities in SAP? Do companies hire freshers in this field? I'm currently 24 years old.

entry.title: Re: LSMW for general task list change
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I know this is old post, however if I can give some more input which might help our functional Consultants in the future.

Thanks to Terence.

1.Create LSMW recording

2.In the task list page, type F6, to go to TL header.

3.This will allow you to change TL header text, Header work center, usage, planner group, overall status, Header System condition

4.In the task list header page, type Shift+F4, to go to TL Operation.

5.In the TL Operation page, select first operation manually and type OBSE in T.Code area.

6.This will allow you to enter TL group, Group counter, Operation No. and Object (O). Continue.

7.In the TL Operation page, type Shift+F5, to go to TL Operation Internal.

8.This will allow you to change Standard text key, Operation text, Op. work center, Control key, Op. System condition, Op. Floc, Execution factor, Number, duration, duration unit, calculation key, activity type etc.

9.In the TL Operation Internal page, type Ctrl+S or Save.

10.Prepare the data file for all the TL Operations to be modified.

11.Test the program.

Kind regards,

Raj

entry.title: Re: Erroneous Authentication Popup when Previewing Fiori Application in BAS
entry.content:
Hi,
Creating a new dev space is resulted with a new URL (since it is including the unique dev space ID), therefore I wonder if this is related to browser cache / cookies issue somehow after a first successful authentication from your application preview (which could be no longer valid after your local docker container restart).
I'm not sure exactly why this happens, but I can suggest trying a better workaround than creating a new dev space for the next time this happens: 
You can try opening developer tools of your browser, find in the network tab the request to your OData service failing with authentication error, and after right clicking on it you can select the option to clear browser cache / cookies for this specific request domain. Then simply refresh your browser tab to trigger the request again.
(tested on Chrome browser).

Thanks,
Rotem

entry.title: Let's Organize our Life
entry.content:
Dear SAP Business One community

Today I want to talk about how you could with a few simple actions, group and sort any list view to better analyze the data in front of you.

Let’s look at this video to learn more.

You can find additional information in the SAP Business One Web client user guide and the Learning journey.

Regards

Ari

entry.title: Re: 1902-Enable Self-Service Features in SuccessFactors Reporting

entry.title: Re: Predictive Accounting in S/4HANA Finance (part I)
entry.content: Thanks for the comment @theswapnil. If you have the predictive ledger active, creating the open sales order during migration it will update the predictive ledger.

entry.title: Email Trigger Issue with OAuth2Password Authentication in SAP CAPM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We were previously using an email destination with Basic Authentication, and it was working as expected. However, as you're aware, Basic Authentication has been deprecated in Office 365, so we have now updated the authentication type to OAuth2Password.
After this change, we are unable to trigger emails from our SAP CAP application.
Error Message: The destination 'name: sap_process_automation_mail' does not contain host or port information as properties. Please configure in the "Additional Properties" of the destination. 
If anyone has encountered a similar scenario or has insights into this issue, your suggestions or assistance would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Navigator API
entry.content:
I'd like to know if there's an API for the SAP Signavio Process Navigator in sap.me. I'd want the API to be able to filter the different solution scenarios/processes  and access their accelerators.  I'm happy to use another API that'll do the same. I essentially need to filter different solution scenarios based on country and version, and then be able to access their accelerator information.

I'm fine if I'm able to download all the processes' accelerators at once too. Currently, through the UI, I'm only able to download only 5 at a time.

entry.title: Re: Email Trigger Issue with OAuth2Password Authenticatio...
entry.content: The documentation for the destinationsap_process_automation_mail can be found at Configure an SMTP Mail Destination. If you can confirm that this issue also occurs with SAP Build Process Automation you should file an issue via SAP Support. If you need support how to use this destination with CAP please post more details how you call the destination.

entry.title: Re: Find source code of fiori applications in Business Ap...
entry.content: The source code should be tracked in a Git repository.

entry.title: Re: Retrieve FIORI Adaptation project from SAP ABAP system
entry.content: /UI5/UI5_REPOSITORY_LOAD

entry.title: Re: Explaining SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) to a Beginner [2025 Updated]

entry.title: Re: SNOTE: SAP object cannot be assigned to package Z***t
entry.content:
• Go to se80 and open the package page.
  • Check if the Package is marked as below  "Main Package" or  "Adding further objects not possible". 
  • it should be de-selected if you want to add objects to that package

entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to connect Power BI to a CDS View in SAP using the OData feed. I’ve created the CDS view and exposed it as an OData service. I copied the OData service URL and used it in Power BI (via Get Data > OData Feed), but I’m encountering the error shown in the screenshot below.

Has anyone faced this issue before? What could be the cause and how can I fix it?

entry.title: Re: sort table by custom added column
entry.content: the only options are to sort by the amount in a specific column, and not by amount in that calculated column like the second image shows

entry.title: Re: Stay Up to Date with the UI5 Renovate Preset Config
entry.content:
Hi Florian,

Great tool and I will explore it... but as I understand this is to always push our project to the latest SAPUI5 version, but what happens in a more conservative environments (large enterprises) where changing constantly to the latest version is not and option and developers and ops teams wants to keep the systems as much a stable as possible.

Do you know if there is a tool like Renovate but that basically scan your repository and identify SAPUI5 applications running ui5 versions that are currently deprecated or which deprecation/out of maintenance date will happen in the next 6 month?

I appreciate your feedback.

Best Regards,

I believe, business rules are only fetch hris-elements field.

Can you try add field under EC Field?

entry.title: Re: Checkboxes Appearing in Outline Panel – How to Revert...

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am a Software Engineer with 18 years of experience in the Microsoft technology stack, including ASP.NET, C#, SQL Server, and Azure. While I have spent most of my career working with Microsoft technologies, I am now exploring SAP and looking forward to expanding my skills into the SAP ecosystem.

As someone new to SAP, I am excited to learn from this amazing community, share ideas, and connect with others on a similar journey. Any tips, resources, or learning paths are always welcome!

Looking forward to growing and contributing here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am originally from Pakistan and currently living in Saudi Arabia.

Excited to be part of this global SAP community and looking forward to connecting with people from around the world!

entry.title: Re: Change the description of AaKF in a planning area SAP...
entry.content:
Hi @contovhal,

With an Attribute As Key Figure (AAKF), you have the following places where you find information on the names / descriptions:

  • Planning Areas > Planning Area [XYZ] > Attribute As Key Figures > [Attribute ID] > Planning Area Attribute Description

You will not that, here, you can not change the Planning Area Attribute Description. Nor can you add the Attribute via Planning Areas > Planning Area [XYZ] > Attributes. So, to answer your question: no, you can not change the Name of the Attribute As Key Figure via 'Planning Areas'. You will see this Planning Area Attribute Description appearing in your Master Data Workbook (Excel Add-In) or in your 'Manage Master Data' app in the WebUI. However, you can change the name and description of this Attribute via the WebUI in the app 'Attributes'. Note that this will likely require re-activation.

Now, if you are not interested in the Master Data, but rather in the Key Figure name, then please read below. Note that these are not directly connected.

Once you have configured an AAKF, you will also see the Key Figure ID (same as Attribute ID) appearing in the following location:

  • Planning Areas > Planning Area [XYZ] > Key Figures > [Attribute ID = Key Figure ID] > Name / Description

Note that the Key Figure Name chosen here will be the one which is visible in the Planning Views. The Description is intended for further explanation of the Key Figure.

I hope this helped.

Kind regards,
Vincent Verheyen

entry.title: Re: What is the first item in the left hand-side navigati...
entry.content:
EDIT: it has just been fixed April 18th, 2025 (https://github.com/sap-tutorials/Tutorials/issues/23430).

Now the correct answer is "Account Explorer".

entry.title: Re: Source list S4/HANA - several vendors marked "fixed"
entry.content:
Dear projectandsourcingoffice,

in S4/HANA public cloud two or more fixed vendors are not possible

What I know from ECC in the past this was different. But normally the system searches the entries in the responsible table and find the first valid one, this is not according to any logic - it is the first possible one with the table keys.

Nevertheless if you want to procure from two or more vendors "fixed" and get your purchase requisition assigned to the fix vendors then i recommend using the quotation function - below attached.

Two vendors are assigned in source list

On quotation header for the material

On item level two different vendors we share the quantity two vendors if needed

Best regards Dennis
